title: tephroseris wagneri
intro: Tephroseris wagneri, also known as Wagner's mountain everlast or mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing pain, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Tephroseris wagneri can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its potential health benefits.
